message:
fix(beads): add IsFlagLikeTitle guards to all bd create call sites (gt-e0kx5)

The --help flag-parsing bug created garbage beads with title '--help' because
exec.Command("bd", "create", ...) call sites bypassed the IsFlagLikeTitle
guard that only existed in the beads Go library Create/CreateWithID functions.

Added guards to:
- cmd/sling.go: reject slinging beads with flag-like titles (prevents dispatch loops)
- cmd/bead.go: reject moving beads with flag-like titles (prevents propagation)
- cmd/swarm.go: reject flag-like epic names
- cmd/convoy.go: reject flag-like convoy names
- cmd/formula.go: reject flag-like formula convoy titles
- cmd/synthesis.go: reject flag-like synthesis titles
- beads/beads_agent.go: CreateAgentBead guard
- beads/beads_queue.go: CreateQueueBead guard
- beads/beads_rig.go: CreateRigBead guard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ import (
 	"strings"
 
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
+	"github.com/steveyegge/gastown/internal/beads"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/gastown/internal/style"
 )
 
@@ -140,6 +141,11 @@ func runBeadMove(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
 	fmt.Printf("  Title: %s\n", source.Title)
 	fmt.Printf("  Type: %s\n", source.Type)
 
+	// Guard against flag-like titles propagating during move (gt-e0kx5)
+	if beads.IsFlagLikeTitle(source.Title) {
+		return fmt.Errorf("refusing to move bead: title %q looks like a CLI flag", source.Title)
+	}
+
 	if beadMoveDryRun {
 		fmt.Printf("\nDry run - would:\n")
 		fmt.Printf("  1. Create new bead with prefix %s\n", targetPrefix)

@@ -555,6 +556,11 @@ func createSynthesisBead(convoyID string, meta *ConvoyMeta, f *formula.Formula,
 		desc.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("\n## Output\n\nWrite synthesis to: %s\n", outputPath))
 	}

+	if beads.IsFlagLikeTitle(title) {
+		return "", fmt.Errorf("refusing to create synthesis bead: title %q looks like a CLI flag", title)
+	}
+
